name: parkour-mcp
description: A content exploration toolkit that helps LLMs surface high signal, unsummarized web content.
long_description:
MCP server providing a content exploration and research synthesis pipeline. Uses clean first-party APIs to surface and explore web content without summarization. Integrates Kagi, Semantic Scholar, arXiv, deps.dev, IETF, GitHub, MediaWiki, Reddit, Discourse, and DOI resolution APIs into a unified tool suite.

**Note:** The web_fetch_js tool (for JavaScript-rendered pages) requires a one-time browser install. Run `playwright install webkit` from any terminal. The other 11 tools work without this step.

KAGI_API_KEY.title: Kagi API Key
KAGI_API_KEY.description: Enables Kagi web search and summarization tools. Get one at https://kagi.com/settings?p=api

GITHUB_TOKEN.title: GitHub Token
GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Personal access token for GitHub API (5000 req/hr vs 60/hr unauthenticated). No special scopes needed for public repos.

S2_API_KEY.title: Semantic Scholar API Key
S2_API_KEY.description: Free API key for higher rate limits on academic paper lookups. Get one at https://www.semanticscholar.org/product/api#api-key

MCP_CONTACT_EMAIL.title: Contact Email
MCP_CONTACT_EMAIL.description: Optional email in API User-Agent headers. Enables CrossRef polite pool (10 req/s vs 5 req/s).

tools.name: kagi_search
tools.description: Search the web using Kagi's curated search index

tools.name: kagi_summarize
tools.description: Summarize content from a URL or text using Kagi's Universal Summarizer

tools.name: web_fetch_sections
tools.description: List a document's section headings to understand page structure

tools.name: web_fetch_incisive
tools.description: Fetch and extract unsummarized content from URLs as markdown

tools.name: web_fetch_js
tools.description: Fetch and interact with JavaScript-rendered web content

tools.name: arxiv
tools.description: Search and retrieve academic papers from arXiv

tools.name: semantic_scholar
tools.description: Search and retrieve academic paper data from Semantic Scholar

tools.name: github
tools.description: Search and retrieve code, issues, and pull requests from GitHub

tools.name: ietf
tools.description: Search and retrieve IETF RFCs, Internet-Drafts, and standards-track documents

tools.name: packages
tools.description: Search and inspect software packages across language ecosystems via deps.dev

tools.name: discourse
tools.description: Search and browse Discourse forum topics and posts

tools.name: mediawiki
tools.description: Search and retrieve Wikipedia and MediaWiki articles with footnote and citation resolution

tools.name: research_shelf
tools.description: Manage the research shelf — an in-memory citation tracker for papers inspected during research
